summary: Tested FLOWTYM Housekeeping V2 NestJS API integration. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend views (Femme de chambre V2, Direction V2) working correctly with real-time data from NestJS API. The hotel_id format mismatch issue from iteration 36 has been RESOLVED - NestJS now accepts UUID format hotel IDs.

issues: Shows 'Mode hors ligne' warning even when connected - WebSocket connection status may need review

passed_tests: GET /api/v2/hotels/{hotelId}/housekeeping/tasks - SUCCESS (returns 21 tasks with all fields)
Housekeeping Reception view with V2 API - SUCCESS (40 rooms displayed)
Femme de chambre V2 view - SUCCESS (21 tasks, timer working, Terminer button visible)
Direction V2 view - SUCCESS (KPIs, floor plan with 40 room chips, 4 active staff)
V2 Temps réel toggle - SUCCESS (visible and active)
critical_code_review_comments: NestJS V2 API now correctly handles UUID format hotel IDs - the BSONError issue from iteration 36 is resolved
WebSocket connection shows 'Mode hors ligne' in UI but data loads correctly - may be a display issue only
All CRUD operations for tasks (start/complete) working correctly with proper status transitions
seed_data_creation: NestJS has demo data for hotel_id 4f02769a-5f63-4121-bb97-a7061563d934 (40 rooms, 21 tasks, 9 staff)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Housekeeping V2 NestJS API is fully functional. All endpoints tested and working. Frontend views (Reception, Femme de chambre V2, Direction V2) display data correctly. The hotel_id format mismatch issue from iteration 36 has been resolved - NestJS now accepts UUID format hotel IDs from FastAPI.

rca_of_the_issue.previous_issue: Hotel_id format mismatch between FastAPI (UUID) and NestJS (ObjectId) - RESOLVED
rca_of_the_issue.resolution: NestJS schemas were modified to accept string hotel_id instead of Types.ObjectId, allowing UUID format IDs to work correctly
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 16 backend tests pass with UUID hotel_id (4f02769a-5f63-4121-bb97-a7061563d934)
